scripts.build: bun build src/content.ts src/popup.ts src/background.ts --outdir dist --format iife --define 'process.env.TYPESTAMP_API_URL="https://typestamp.com"'
scripts.dev: bun build src/content.ts src/popup.ts src/background.ts --outdir dist --format iife --watch --define 'process.env.TYPESTAMP_API_URL="http://localhost:5000"'
